channel.title: QRL Ecosystem Index
channel.description: Recent content on QRL Ecosystem Index

item.title: MyQRLWallet
item.description:
MyQRLWallet is a DigitalGuards web wallet for QRL 2.0. It provides a browser-based interface for creating accounts and managing transactions on the quantum-resistant ledger.

The wallet is part of the DigitalGuards QRL Zond ecosystem and links to a public frontend repository.

item.title: QRL Hub
item.description:
itle: QRL Hub twitter: "" updated: “2026-05-29”

QRL Hub is a community-maintained resource website for learning about QRL, quantum computing threats, blockchain security, and the quantum-resistant future of cryptocurrency. The site includes educational pages, FAQs, quantum news, QRL 2.0 information, and links to the official QRL website.

QRL Hub states that it is not associated with the QRL

item.title: ZondScan
item.description:
: - testnet tags: - explorer - zond - validators title: ZondScan twitter: "" updated: “2026-06-09”

ZondScan is a DigitalGuards block explorer for the QRL Zond network. It provides a web interface for exploring blocks, transactions, smart contracts, validators, addresses, and network activity.

The project is open source and built with a Next.js frontend,
